# ScaleSage

> AI & Automation Specialists. We diagnose your business, build custom AI systems you own, and prove the results in numbers — so you capture more revenue and get found across the search frontier (Google, SEO, and AI engines: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini).

ScaleSage is a specialist team — never an agency. Approach: the Business Doctor — we don't pitch, we diagnose. Diagnose → Build → Prove. We are "Customer Zero": we run every system on ourselves before we sell it.

## What we do
- Custom AI Agents — agents that answer, qualify and book, built for your business and owned by you.
- Automation builds — n8n, Make or custom; the repetitive work runs itself.
- Revenue Recovery OS — capture, follow-up and reactivation as one system.
- Search & AI Visibility — AEO, GEO, LLMO and SEO so you're the answer across Google and AI engines.
- Frontier Intelligence — market intelligence and working demos before you commit.
- Trades Talent Engine — attract, screen and book skilled labour.
- AI Ops & Governance — multi-model verification, guardrails and oversight.

## The Catalyst Diagnostic
A paid, structured diagnosis. Before any call, our agents study your site, reviews and competitor stack and build a working demo of the highest-leverage fixes.
- Local Health Check — £150
- ScaleSage Diagnostic — £750
Fully credited against your first retainer if you sign within 60 days. You keep the report either way. No login or payment to begin.

## Pricing (public)
- Local — Starter £297/mo, Growth £597/mo, Scale £997/mo
- Business — Starter £997/mo, Growth £1,997/mo, Scale £2,997/mo
- Enterprise — £9,997/mo+
Exact scope and quote are set by your Catalyst Diagnostic.

## Ownership & data
Every system and agent is owned by you — no templates, no lock-in. Encrypted, GDPR-compliant, consent-first. We never sell your data or use it to train external AI.

## Industries
Commercial MEP / data-center buildout (showcase), Deeptech / Space / Robotics, Local trades, Real estate, Restaurants, B2B SaaS, Healthcare, Government & Defense.
